content:
🚀 scientific-agent-skills | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To empower AI agents with specialized capabilities to execute complex scientific research and analysis tasks across multiple disciplines.
✨ Key Features: • 138 ready-to-use scientific and research skills • Supports the open Agent Skills standard for broad compatibility
📖 Summary: Scientific Agent Skills provides a comprehensive collection of 138 pre-built skills for AI agents, enabling them to perform complex scientific and research workflows across various domains like bioinformatics, drug discovery, and materials science. These skills adhere to the open Agent Skills standard, ensuring broad compatibility with different AI agent frameworks.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
